title: The Backrooms
description: Adds the backrooms with some extra good loot.
body:
# The Backrooms

Adds the backrooms dimension with some extra good loot.

## Features
- Adds a custom dimension being the backrooms, which can be accessed by throwing an enderpearl at a yellow carpet and can be left by right clicking a bed in the backrooms.
- Contains barrels which can contain enchanted books with higher levels than usually available: Swift Sneak 4, Feather Falling 5 and Respiration 4
- They can also have Knockback sticks
- The custom dimension is full of wood, stone and other things with different biomes including 
  - Normal (Stripped birch log, Sandstone, Polished diorite and Ochre froglights)
  - Red (Stripped acacia log, Sandstone, Polished diorite and Ochre froglights)
  - Stone (Cobblestone, Stone, Smooth stone and Sea lanterns)
  - Wood (Oak log, Oak planks, Redstone lamps and Levers)
- Also has cobweb filled sections, water sections and sculk sections
- Has a monster which does a lot of damage but can be killed and drops rubber armour, reversing knockback

Fully server-side, no client installation needed (unless you want it in singleplayer).
